---
title: "AEM 6850 · Fall 2026"
pagetitle: "AEM 6850 · Fall 2026"
---

::: {.aem-hero}

<span class="wip-badge">Work in Progress</span>

<p class="hero-eyebrow">AEM 6850 · Fall 2026</p>

<h1 class="hero-title">Course site coming soon</h1>

<p class="hero-tagline">
This page is a placeholder. The full site for the Fall 2026 offering of
AEM 6850 will be published here ahead of the semester.
</p>

:::

::: {.aem-panel}

## About

AEM 6850 — *Empirical Methods for Applied Economists* — is taught by
[Prof. Ariel Ortiz-Bobea](https://arielortizbobea.github.io)
at the Charles H. Dyson School of Applied Economics and Management,
Cornell University.

:::
